No appearance by defendant: Grant McCune

Judgment in favor of Plaintiff: Irene M. Lieberman and against defendant: Grant McCune
for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at:
1570 Sutter St. #103, San Francisco
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Back rent: $1,926.00
Per diem of $31.66 X 88 Days = $2,786.08
Costs of $148.00
Total Judgment of $4,860.30
Plaintiff attorney to submit judgment for signature.
